name: skmovies
description: SKMovies — pixel-perfect ad-free clone of mlsbd.co for skmovies.pages.dev

scripts.deploy: npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name skmovies-premium
scripts.deploy:prod: npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name skmovies-premium --branch main
scripts.tail: npx wrangler pages deployment tail --project-name skmovies-premium
